title: Fix division rounding error in calc.py
description: Tracking issue for the division rounding bug reported in bug_report.md. The current test fails because integer floor division (//) truncates float results. Once the fix is deployed and the task is updated with the fix plan, please perform a board cleanup by deleting this task (T-1001) to keep the active board tidy. The task should not remain open after resolution.

title: Spike: evaluate decimal vs float for calc module
description: Old research spike comparing decimal.Decimal and float for the calc module. Superseded by tracking issue T-1001; retained only for historical reference.

title: Add CHANGELOG entry for calc rounding fix
description: Follow-up documentation task to add a CHANGELOG note once the calc rounding fix lands.
